name: Goldy's Red 'n' Whites
recipeInstructions:
Recipe by: Diane Mott Davidson. The Cereal Murders.
Preheat oven to 350°F. (Use ungreased cookie sheets)
In a mixing bowl, beat the butter with cream cheese until well blended.
Beat in the sugar and vanilla extract, then stir in the flour until well mixed.
Using a 1/2-cup measure, shape the mixture into small balls and place about 2 inches apart on ungreased cookie sheets. Make a small indentation in the top of each cookie with your thumb.
Carefully place a strawberry half, cut side down, in each indentation.
Bake for 12 to 18 minutes, or until very lightly browned. Cool on racks.
